name: Data Stream
description: Flowing data transmission tones with digital clarity

prompts.SessionStart: rapid staccato digital synth ascending with bright data burst, digital stream tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SessionEnd: staccato digital synth descending with crisp data wind-down, digital stream tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.Stop: single crisp staccato digital synth chime with bright data ring, digital stream, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PreToolUse: quick distinct digital staccato tick with brief data click, stream tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PostToolUse: short staccato digital chirp confirming with bright data ping, stream tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two staccato digital tones with questioning rapid rise, data stream sound, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady staccato digital pulse with clear rhythmic data pattern, stream hum, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStart: staccato digital synth splitting into two parallel data streams, digital tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStop: clear staccato digital ping returning with crisp data ring, stream tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright rapid staccato digital burst with energetic data attack, stream tone, sci-fi notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
